{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-6863", "cvss": {"score": 6.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:H/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:H/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-863", "name": "Incorrect Authorization"}], "description": "Velociraptor versions prior to 0.76.4 contain a cross organization authorization bypass in the HTTP API. A user with only the reader role in the root organization (the lowest authenticated role, holding only READ_RESULTS permission ) can issue a single authenticated HTTP GET that can read any files from other orgs - even if they have no explicit permissions in the target org.



However, the problem does not occur in reverse - a user with read access to a sub org is unable to read from other org or the root org.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00236, "percentile": 0.14501}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-2v93-vp82-cjv8", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-11T14:58:15Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2v93-vp82-cjv8", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-2v93-vp82-cjv8"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-6863"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-06T16:16:12Z", "published_at": "2026-05-06T18:30:30Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-6863", "https://docs.velociraptor.app/announcements/advisories/cve-2026-6863", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2v93-vp82-cjv8"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/Velocidex/velociraptor", "summary": "Velocidex Velociraptor has an Incorrect Authorization issue", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-11T14:58:17Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-2v93-vp82-cjv8", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.76.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "www.velocidex.com/golang/velociraptor"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.76.4"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Velocidex Velociraptor has an Incorrect Authorization issue
